prompt:
A handheld flashlight with a red lens cap on a clean surface, turned on to cast a soft red glow across a nearby map and notebook edge. A 9 V battery and a small screwdriver lie beside it, implying simple power and maintenance without any branding.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a grounded near-future stargazing aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, minimal clutter, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Make the red lens and gentle glow the unmistakable focal point at icon scale.
